title: Shawerma totem
description: Resource pack that changes the totem to shawerma
body: Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft with the new and fun resource pack “Shawerma totem”! Forget about the standard Totem of Immortality, because now every time your character is on the verge of death, he is saved not by a magical artifact, but by a delicious tidbit - shawarma!![o](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/674eeabf553016646bc9e5058ac206ed140d017e.png)
